subject: Move ONAP.featureFlags to a K8S ConfigMap
commit_message:

Signed-off-by: marcinrzepeckiwroc <marcin.rzepecki@nokia.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Looks good to me, but I`d like Ikram to have a look at the contents of the configMap.
We shall review that in context of ONAP Guilin, and probably new features introduced last 2 months in VID. Today the cfgMap is a 1:1 copy of the existing onap.features.properties from VID container...
(Which haven`t bee updated for looong...)
